name: Startup Launch Checklist
tagline: The step-by-step sequence, not just a list of vague advice.
differentiator: Sequenced in the actual order operations happen, not a random brain-dump of 47 generic bullet points.
description: Everything to do before you take your first client or sale — pre-launch foundation, pricing & positioning, first-client readiness, launch marketing basics, and a 30-day follow-up, all in order.
whoFor: First-time founders and freelancers who want a sequence to follow instead of another motivational listicle.
